text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home, Mihono Bourbon says that she
wants to run in even bigger races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has never been able to express her emotions
well, nor is she one to assert herself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now, she appears to have found the pleasure
in racing after her many encounters with her
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower, who has also greatly improved,
challenges Mihono Bourbon to a rematch at the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a grand race with Rice Shower, Mejiro
McQueen, and Tokai Teio. Mihono Bourbon's
eyes glint with excitement at the prospect.
